ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy level of the experiment in MeV */,
  "scattering_angle" REAL /* Angle of scattering measured in degrees */,
  "experimental_value" REAL /* Measured value from the experiment */,
  "statistical_error" REAL /* Statistical error associated with the experimental value */,
  "reaction_type" TEXT /* Type of reaction (e.g., PP) */,
  "observable" TEXT /* Observable being measured (e.g., AYY) */,
  "systematic_error" REAL /* Systematic error associated with the measurement */,
  "normalization" REAL /* Normalization factor applied to the experimental value */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "experiment_location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment was conducted */,
  "experiment_setup_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to reference the experimental setup used */,
  "dataset_version" TEXT /* Version number for the dataset */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the experiment record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the experiment record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_experiment_setup_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_setup_id") REFERENCES experimental_setups ("setup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_reaction_type FOREIGN KEY ("reaction_type") REFERENCES reaction_types ("reaction_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_observable FOREIGN KEY ("observable") REFERENCES observables ("observable_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "reaction_types" (
  "reaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reaction type */,
  "reaction_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the reaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reaction type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the reaction type record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reaction type record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the reaction type record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reaction type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observables" (
  "observable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observable */,
  "observable_name" TEXT /* Name of the observable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the observable */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the observable */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the observable record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the observable record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the observable record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the observable record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the user record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the user record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the access log record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error type */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of statistical error (e.g., systematic, statistical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the error type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the error type record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error type record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the error type record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_setups" (
  "setup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimental setup */,
  "setup_name" TEXT /* Name of the experimental setup */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experimental setup */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the setup record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setup record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the setup record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setup record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimental condition */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the experimental condition */,
  "condition_value" TEXT /* Value of the experimental condition */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the condition record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the condition record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the condition record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the condition record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_conditions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
